events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Mariano's 30th birthday celebration in Chicago. Flights already booked. Planning a 1-2 night warm backpacking trip beforehand (Mar 14-15 weekend), then heading to Chicago for the birthday party.
events.hook: Book warm backpacking destination and flights for the pre-birthday trip. Figure out REI gear rentals and confirm logistics before the trip.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7. Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Now in activity planning and shopping phase. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Validate eyeglasses prescription requirements and finalize activity plans for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
